title: Perry's Botany
body:
# Perry's Botany
This mod adds a few nice decoration blocks to your Minecraft world
## Features
- blue, magenta, purple, yellow potted plant
- gold, brick, metal, wood potted tree
- blue, red, green, purple, yellow flower box
- blue, red, green, purple, flower box hanging
- more comming soon
## More Mods Like This
[Click here for more](https://modrinth.com/collection/KL3Q1bWP)
## Planned Backport
A backport to Forge 1.20.x is planned once there is clear interest.
If this mod reaches around 500+ downloads, a Forge 1.20 version will be released as well.

> Want a backport sooner? Let me know or share the mod to support its visibility!

## Also on CurseForge
👉
